response.step_by_step_log:
1. Observed the video: A single, continuous performance by the VTuber IRyS.
2. OCR/Text check: Text "X-encounter" appears in the top-left, and "#Promise2U" in the top-right.
3. Song Identification: "X-encounter" is a well-known anime opening theme from 'Tokyo Ravens'.
4. Search strategy: Used '"X-encounter" Maon Kurosaki Japanese and English lyrics' to find the metadata and translations.
5. Result: Confirmed the song title, artist, and language, and retrieved the lyrics/translation.
6. JSON construction: Mapped the single-scene performance to the requested JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features a live virtual concert performance by Hololive English VTuber IRyS, singing the song "X-encounter", originally by Maon Kurosaki (from the anime 'Tokyo Ravens'). The performance takes place on a futuristic, neon-lit stage.

scenes.description: IRyS performs "X-encounter" on a virtual stage. Top-right corner displays #Promise2U.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
飛べない... 
ここからじゃ横顔眺めてるだけじゃ 
無力さを嘆いても 
この背を誰も押さない 
Going out! 
-飛び方を忘れて 
闇の鴉が鳴く声...- 
凍りついた無機質な世界、何を望む？
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I can't fly... 
From here I just watch from the sidelines 
Even if I lament this powerlessness 
There's no one who'll push my back 
Going out! 
-I forgot how to fly 
The voices of the wailing ravens of darkness...- 
From a freezing and inorganic world, what could you desire?
